\tzpentry{ID5570}{Phase Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5570 introduces Phase Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \dot{\phi}_i = \Omega_i + \sum_{j\neq i}\sum_{(p,q)} K_{ij}^{(p:q)}\, \sin\!\big(p\,\phi_j - q\,\phi_i\big). \end{equation}
